title: Big Tech’s AI spending is catching up with its cash flow
summary: Epoch AI estimates that hyperscaler capex is expanding at roughly 70% a year while operating cash flow grows about 23%, which puts aggregate spending on track to overtake operating cash flow around the third quarter of 2026.
caption: output/2026-07-22/big-tech-s-ai-spending-is-catching-up-with-its-cash-flow.txt
